tripOverview.intro: San Juan combines vibrant Caribbean culture with stunning beaches and colorful colonial architecture. This tropical paradise offers romantic sunsets, world-class dining, and crystal-clear waters perfect for unforgettable beach days.
tripOverview.vibe: Your romantic Puerto Rican adventure blends stunning beaches with vibrant culture and delicious cuisine.

destinationOverview.bestTime: April offers perfect weather with warm temperatures, lower humidity, and minimal rainfall - ideal for beach days and exploring.

attractions.name: Condado Beach
attractions.desc: Popular beach with soft sand, clear waters, and beachfront hotels.

attractions.name: El Yunque Rainforest
attractions.desc: Tropical rainforest with waterfalls, hiking trails, and diverse wildlife.

attractions.name: Old San Juan
attractions.desc: Historic colonial district with colorful buildings and cobblestone streets.

attractions.name: Fort San Felipe del Morro
attractions.desc: 16th-century fortress with stunning ocean views and rich history.

destinationOverview.transportation: San Juan offers reliable public buses (AMA) connecting major areas for $0.75 per ride. Taxis are readily available but use meters or agree on fares upfront, with rides from the airport costing $15-25. Uber and Lyft operate throughout the metro area with convenient app-based booking and transparent pricing.
destinationOverview.tip: Rent a car for exploring beyond San Juan, but stick to rideshare in the city center where parking is challenging and walking is more enjoyable.
destinationOverview.safety: San Juan is generally safe for tourists, especially in Old San Juan and Condado, but avoid walking alone at night in less touristy areas.
destinationOverview.airaloText: Stay connected with an eSIM for seamless navigation, restaurant bookings, and sharing your beach paradise moments with friends back home.

days.intro: Explore the colorful colonial streets and historic forts of this UNESCO World Heritage site.

morning.name: Arrive & Check-in
morning.desc: Get settled and oriented in your accommodation.

morning.name: Old San Juan Walking Tour
morning.desc: Self-guided exploration of cobblestone streets and colorful buildings.

afternoon.name: Fort San Felipe del Morro
afternoon.desc: Explore the historic fortress with panoramic ocean views.

afternoon.name: Paseo de la Princesa
afternoon.desc: Romantic waterfront promenade perfect for photos.

evening.name: Sunset at El Morro
evening.desc: Watch the sunset from the fortress walls.

evening.name: Welcome Dinner
evening.desc: Traditional Puerto Rican cuisine at a local restaurant.

days.tip: Wear comfortable walking shoes for the cobblestone streets and bring a light jacket for evening fortress visits.

days.intro: Soak up the sun at Condado Beach with crystal-clear waters and soft sand.

morning.name: Beach Setup at Condado
morning.desc: Rent chairs and umbrellas for a comfortable beach day.

morning.name: Swimming & Sunbathing
morning.desc: Enjoy the warm Caribbean waters and beautiful beach.

afternoon.name: Beachside Lunch
afternoon.desc: Fresh seafood and tropical drinks with ocean views.

afternoon.name: Water Sports
afternoon.desc: Try paddleboarding or kayaking in the calm waters.

evening.name: Beach Sunset
evening.desc: Romantic sunset watching from the beach.

days.tip: Apply sunscreen frequently and stay hydrated - the Caribbean sun is stronger than you think!

days.intro: Discover the lush El Yunque National Forest with waterfalls and hiking trails.

morning.name: El Yunque Departure
morning.desc: Drive or tour to the rainforest (1 hour from San Juan).

morning.name: La Mina Falls Hike
morning.desc: Easy hike to beautiful waterfall and swimming hole.

afternoon.name: Yokahu Tower
afternoon.desc: Climb the observation tower for rainforest canopy views.

afternoon.name: Luquillo Beach
afternoon.desc: Relax at this beautiful beach near El Yunque.

evening.name: Return to San Juan
evening.desc: Drive back to the city for evening activities.

evening.name: Local Food Tour
evening.desc: Sample traditional Puerto Rican street food.

days.tip: Bring water shoes for waterfall swimming and a waterproof bag for your phone and valuables.

days.intro: Immerse yourself in Puerto Rican art, music, and local traditions.

morning.name: Museo de Arte de Puerto Rico
morning.desc: Explore the island's finest art museum with contemporary and classical works.

morning.name: Santurce Art District
morning.desc: Walk through vibrant street art and murals in this creative neighborhood.

afternoon.name: La Placita de Santurce
afternoon.desc: Experience this colorful market square and cultural hub.

afternoon.name: Cueva Ventana
afternoon.desc: Tour the stunning cave with dramatic valley views.

evening.name: Salsa Dancing Lesson
evening.desc: Learn traditional Puerto Rican dance moves together.

evening.name: Live Music at La Placita
evening.desc: Enjoy authentic Puerto Rican music and dancing.

days.tip: Learn a few Spanish phrases - locals appreciate the effort and it enhances your cultural experience.

days.intro: Enjoy intimate beach time and romantic experiences perfect for couples.

morning.name: Isla Verde Beach
morning.desc: Discover this beautiful beach with calmer waters and fewer crowds.

morning.name: Couples Massage
morning.desc: Relaxing beachside spa treatment for two.

afternoon.name: Ocean Park Beach
afternoon.desc: LGBTQ+-friendly beach with a laid-back, welcoming atmosphere.

afternoon.name: Snorkeling Adventure
afternoon.desc: Explore underwater coral reefs and tropical fish.

evening.name: Sunset Catamaran
evening.desc: Romantic sailing trip with champagne and stunning sunset views.

evening.name: Fine Dining
evening.desc: Elegant dinner at an upscale oceanfront restaurant.

days.tip: Book the sunset catamaran in advance - it's popular and offers the most romantic views of the coastline.

days.intro: Savor Puerto Rico's culinary scene and experience the vibrant nightlife.

morning.name: Coffee Plantation Tour
morning.desc: Learn about Puerto Rican coffee culture and taste fresh brews.

morning.name: Mercado de Río Piedras
morning.desc: Explore this traditional market for local produce and crafts.

afternoon.name: Cooking Class
afternoon.desc: Learn to prepare traditional vegetarian Puerto Rican dishes.

afternoon.name: Food Truck Rally
afternoon.desc: Sample diverse vegetarian options from local food trucks.

evening.name: Rum Tasting Experience
evening.desc: Learn about Puerto Rico's rum heritage with guided tastings.

evening.name: LGBTQ+ Nightlife Tour
evening.desc: Experience San Juan's welcoming and vibrant gay nightlife scene.

days.tip: Try the local coffee varieties - Puerto Rican coffee is world-class but often overlooked by tourists.

days.intro: Enjoy a peaceful final morning before your flight home.

morning.name: Final Beach Morning
morning.desc: Last chance to enjoy the beautiful Caribbean waters.

morning.name: Souvenir Shopping
morning.desc: Pick up local crafts and coffee to take home.

afternoon.name: Farewell Lunch
afternoon.desc: Final Puerto Rican meal at a local favorite restaurant.

afternoon.name: Airport Transfer
afternoon.desc: Head to the airport for your flight home.

evening.name: Flight Departure
evening.desc: Board your flight back to Philadelphia with amazing memories.

days.tip: Leave extra time for airport security and consider arriving 2 hours early for your domestic flight.

food.intro: Puerto Rico's food scene blends Spanish, African, and indigenous influences with fresh local ingredients and creative vegetarian options.
food.tip: Many restaurants offer excellent vegetarian versions of traditional dishes - don't hesitate to ask about plant-based options.

neighborhoods.name: Old San Juan
neighborhoods.desc: Historic charm with cobblestone streets, colorful buildings, and walkable attractions.
neighborhoods.whyStay: Immersive cultural experience with easy access to forts, museums, and authentic restaurants.

neighborhoods.name: Condado
neighborhoods.desc: Modern beach district with upscale hotels, restaurants, and beautiful beaches.
neighborhoods.whyStay: Perfect beach access with high-end amenities and vibrant nightlife scene.

neighborhoods.name: Isla Verde
neighborhoods.desc: Beach area near the airport with resort hotels and water activities.
neighborhoods.whyStay: Close to airport with excellent beaches and more affordable than Condado.

luxury.name: La Concha Renaissance San Juan Resort

hotels.tip: Book accommodations with beach access or within walking distance to beaches for the best romantic experience.

getYourGuide.name: El Yunque Waterfalls and Rainforest Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Full-day guided tour with transportation and hiking to beautiful waterfalls.

getYourGuide.name: Bioluminescent Lagoon Kayak Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Evening kayaking experience in the magical glowing waters of Laguna Grande.

getYourGuide.name: San Juan Food and Culture Walking Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Taste local specialties while learning about Puerto Rican history and culture.

hiddenGems.name: Casa Blanca Museum
hiddenGems.desc: Historic house museum with gardens offering peaceful views over San Juan Bay.

hiddenGems.name: Cueva Ventana
hiddenGems.desc: Stunning cave with a natural window overlooking the beautiful Río Grande valley.

hiddenGems.name: Ocean Park Beach
hiddenGems.desc: Local favorite beach with a relaxed, LGBTQ+-friendly atmosphere away from tourist crowds.

packing.title: April in San Juan, Puerto Rico
